title: Microsoft Marketplace | Cloud Solutions, AI Apps, and Agents
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text: Ship production-ready AI products faster with Microsoft Marketplace Learn more MICROSOFT MARKETPLACE Microsoft Marketplace—your trusted source for cloud solutions, AI apps, and agents "> Microsoft Marketplace—your trusted source for cloud solutions, AI apps, and agents Find, try, and buy tens of thousands of solutions including AI apps and agents to help you innovate faster. Explore a comprehensive catalog Discover Microsoft partner offerings across cloud solutions and industries—all in one place. See all solutions View AI apps and agents OVERVIEW Why Microsoft Marketplace "> Why Microsoft Marketplace Accelerate transformation with AI apps and agents for every use case Choose from the largest catalog of AI apps and agents in the industry to help solve your unique challenges. Navigate comprehensive offerings confidently with intelligent discovery Quickly identify the right solution for your organization with smart search, product comparison, and interactive chat that helps narrow solutions by use case, industry, or Microsoft product integration. Game-changing experience from discovery to deployment Find, try, and buy solutions contextually within a range of Microsoft products—including Microsoft Foundry and Microsoft 365 Copilot—providing access to solutions in the flow of work. Maximize investments with your cloud commitment Earn discounts on your Azure infrastructure using a Microsoft Azure Consumption Commitment. 100% of purchases from eligible Marketplace solutions count towards your commitment—with no limits. FEATURED APPS Explore powerful Marketplace solutions from our partners "> Explore powerful Marketplace solutions from our partners Fuel innovation with solutions from Microsoft Marketplace that span all categories, including AI apps and agents, infrastructure services, databases, collaboration, and security. Back to tabs See all apps WAYS TO BUY Choose purchasing options that best meet your needs "> Choose purchasing options that best meet your needs Digital direct Quickly find, try, and buy solutions in our digital storefront with enhanced search by use case, industry, or Microsoft product. Learn more Partners Work with a preferred channel partner to purchase and manage solutions on your behalf. Learn more Private offers Get solutions that meet your organization’s specific needs by negotiating through private offers. Learn more THE VALUE OF MARKETPLACE IDC MarketScape names Microsoft a leader "> IDC MarketScape names Microsoft a leader See why IDC MarketScape recognizes Microsoft as a Leader in Hyperscaler Marketplaces. 1 Read the excerpt CUSTOMER STORIES See how Marketplace customers are innovating "> See how Marketplace customers are innovating Previous Slide Next Slide “Marketplace eliminates painstaking supplier onboarding process, significantly enhancing risk management.” Hannah Foote, Procurement Manager, Nationwide Building Society 25%"> 25% Time saved on procurement process Read the story "The reason we came to Microsoft Marketplace was because we needed to consume technology at pace—making it simpler, smarter, and faster.” Matt Lockie, IT Foundation Operations Director 6-12 Months for project delivery instead of years Read the story “Purchases from Marketplace give us better control. We have a single purchase order, a single invoice, that gives us a brilliant view of our cloud landscape….” Jatin Suri, Senior Vice President of Cloud COE 100% Purchases of eligible solutions applied towards cloud consumption commitment Read the story Back to CUSTOMER STORIES section. RESOURCES Learn more about Microsoft Marketplace "> Learn more about Microsoft Marketplace Get all the information you need to make the most of Marketplace with guides, videos, webinars, and other valuable resources. Explore documentation Guides Webinars and videos Documentation Previous Next Previous Slide Next Slide Get started with Marketplace "> Guide Get started with Marketplace Learn how to cut costs, move fast, and streamline cloud purchases by adopting Marketplace. Download the guide Simplify procurement with Marketplace "> Guide Simplify procurement with Marketplace See how Marketplace helps maximize tech investments, increase efficiency, and support governance. Download the guide Back to Resources - Guides tab section Previous Slide Next Slide Learn from Marketplace experts "> Webinar Learn from Marketplace experts Get your questions answered by joining customer office hours and watching recorded help sessions. Register now Empower innovation without sacrificing governance "> Video Empower innovation without sacrificing governance See how you can get the solutions you need and maintain strict controls with a private Marketplace. Watch the video Restrict access to authorized buyers only "> Video Restrict access to authorized buyers only Ensure that only approved individuals can make purchases by aligning Azure controls with Marketplace. Watch the video Back to Resources -Webinars and videos tab section Previous Slide Next Slide Get in-depth guidance for Microsoft Marketplace "> Documentation Get in-depth guidance for Microsoft Marketplace Find everything you need to know, including information about governance, procurement, and billing. Explore documentation Learn the ins and outs of private offers "> Documentation Learn the ins and outs of private offers Make a deal that fits your specific needs, including purchasing through a preferred channel partner. Read the documentation Help fulfill your organization's cloud commitment "> Documentation Help fulfill your organization's cloud commitment Find out how eligible solutions help you meet your Microsoft Azure Consumption Commitment (MACC). Read the documentation Back to Resources - Documentation tab section Back to tabs Smart AI adoption Drive AI innovation through Microsoft Marketplace Accelerate your AI transformation with Copilot agents and AI applications built on Azure and available through Marketplace. 4,000+ AI apps and agents 11,000+ models 2"> 2x increase in AI solutions purchased 2 Explore AI apps and agents Get the latest Marketplace news "> Get the latest Marketplace news Read about what’s new with Microsoft Marketplace. Stay informed Microsoft Marketplace Start exploring this comprehensive catalog of partner solutions "> Start exploring this comprehensive catalog of partner solutions Access thousands of Microsoft and partner solutions that span infrastructure, AI, industry apps, and more. Browse Microsoft Marketplace Sell your solution through Marketplace "> Become a partner Sell your solution through Marketplace Connect with millions of customers, go to market faster, and fuel business growth. Learn more Create for the future with Microsoft Foundry "> Start building Create for the future with Microsoft Foundry Develop and deploy generative AI apps and APIs—responsibly. Learn more [1] IDC MarketScape: Worldwide Hyperscaler Marketplaces 2025 Vendor Assessment. [2] Microsoft internal data.
